allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(p\).read\(\)\) for p in ['main.py','config.py','llm_client.py','database/models.py','database/client.py','routers/tasks.py','routers/agents.py','routers/messages.py','routers/analytics.py','routers/websocket.py']]; print\('all files parse OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; t = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status:', t['status']\); print\('agents:', t['assigned_agents']\); print\('plan subtasks:', len\(t.get\('plan'\) or {}\).__class__ is int and len\(\(t.get\('plan'\) or {}\).get\('subtasks', []\)\)\); print\(\); print\('--- result ---'\); print\(json.dumps\(t.get\('result'\), indent=2\)[:2000]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; tasks = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(tasks\)} tasks'\); print\(json.dumps\(tasks[0], indent=2\) if tasks else 'empty'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; print\([a['name'] for a in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('type:', type\(d\).__name__\); print\('count:', len\(d\) if isinstance\(d, list\) else 'n/a'\); print\('keys[0]:', list\(d[0].keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d, list\) and d else 'empty'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\(p for p in d['paths'] if 'analytic' in p\)\)")
